# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-operator
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  profile: minimal
  values:
    pilot:
      enabled: true
      debug: true
      tls: false
    mixer:
      enabled: true
    kubeInjector:
      enabled: true
      autoMountServiceAccountToken: true
      policies:
        http:
        - mode: TrafficPolicy
          match:
            namespace: ".*"
          resources:
            limits: {}
            targets:
              gateways:
                "*":
                  ports:
                    "-":
                      to:
                        clusterTag: sidecar-istio-ingressgateway
                        port: 15000
                        protocol: TCP
                    "80":
                    "443":
              virtualServices:
                "*":
                  hosts:
                    "-":
                      routes:
                        - destination:
                            host: istio-inflight
                            port:
                              number: 15000
                          weight: 100
                    "*.istio-system.svc.cluster.local":
                      routes:
                        - destination:
                            host: istiod
                            port:
                              number: 15008
                          weight: 1
                    "*":
                      tls: {}
                      routes:
                        - destination:
                            host: localhost
                            port:
                              number: 15020
                          routeAction:
                            url: /config_dump
                          weight: 90
                        - destination:
                            host: localhost
                            port:
                              number: 15021
                          routeAction:
                            url: /stats
                          weight: 91
                        - destination:
                            host: localhost
                            port:
                              number: 15029
                          routeAction:
                            url: /clusters
                          weight: 92
